query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `unmatched_dixi_records` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `obraId` int,
  `mesReferencia` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
  `dixiName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `dixiId` varchar(50),
  `data` date NOT NULL,
  `entrada1` varchar(10),
  `saida1` varchar(10),
  `entrada2` varchar(10),
  `saida2` varchar(10),
  `entrada3` varchar(10),
  `saida3` varchar(10),
  `batidasBrutas` json,
  `status` enum('pendente','vinculado','descartado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `linkedEmployeeId` int,
  `resolvidoPor` varchar(255),
  `resolvidoEm` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `udr_company_mes` (`companyId`, `mesReferencia`),
  INDEX `udr_status` (`status`),
  INDEX `udr_dixi_name` (`dixiName`)
);
